name: Carrot Spice Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat your oven to the appropriate temperature.
2. Place all dry ingredients (bread flour, powdered milk, salt, and allspice) in the bread pan.
3. Add the grated carrots, butter, honey, water, and yeast into the bread pan.
4. Close the lid and select the "Bake" mode on your appliance.
5. Press start to begin baking. Follow any additional instructions provided by your appliance for a fully baked loaf.
